_comment: Run scaffolding deck for the exploratory product-journey pilot.

scenes.title: Product Journey Eval
scenes.subtitle: Local harness complete; three project lanes validated; product-site journey remains next
scenes.narration: Pilot implementation landed in a worktree under .worktrees so the branch stays isolated and reviewable.

scenes.title: Objective status

items.label: Harness objective
items.detail: tools/product-journey/run.py gives one local entrypoint and project catalog.

items.label: Project lanes
items.detail: gears-rust, PostgreSQL, and Kubernetes each have deterministic local oracles.

items.label: No-cost automation
items.detail: Checks are no-LLM by default and rerunnable from a local checkout.

items.label: Proposal cleanup
items.detail: Finished epic proposal was removed; durable evidence moved into docs and .context logs.

items.label: Product-site journey
items.detail: Run the production web build and use it for skeptical-operator walkthroughs.

scenes.caption: Objective state: the local deterministic eval harness is complete; remaining work is the product-site journey.
scenes.narration: The objective is complete for the local deterministic harness and project-lane oracles. The next product work is to run the site journey itself.

scenes.title: Verified lanes

items.label: gears-rust
items.detail: External benchmark fixtures: cached validated pass, with recheck available as an opt-in.

items.label: PostgreSQL
items.detail: ALTER DOMAIN VALIDATE CONSTRAINT oracle: baseline red, fix green.

items.label: Kubernetes
items.detail: nil-Memory guard oracle: baseline panic, fix green.

scenes.caption: The report's headline is not 'we ran tools'; it is that every planned lane now has deterministic evidence.

scenes.title: Latest check state

items.label: gears-rust
items.detail: Cached external benchmark pass; heavy recheck stays explicit.

items.label: PostgreSQL
items.detail: ALTER DOMAIN VALIDATE CONSTRAINT oracle proves baseline red and fix green.

items.label: Kubernetes
items.detail: nil-Memory guard oracle proves baseline panic and fix green.

scenes.caption: Each lane has a concrete no-LLM check path; expensive refreshes remain operator-triggered.

scenes.title: Local execution artifacts

items.label: Proposal
items.detail: The finished epic proposal was removed after the implementation landed.

items.label: Run log
items.detail: Chronological record of harness setup, lane validation, and cleanup.

items.label: Deck source
items.detail: Committed Slidey report source for VS Code preview and deterministic rendering.

scenes.caption: The finished proposal was removed; durable evidence is now docs plus .context logs.

scenes.title: Next moves
scenes.narration: The remaining work is operational: run the product site from a production build for A/B journeys, refresh heavy evidence only on demand, and keep transient notes in dot-context.

items.label: Site journey
items.detail: Stage with make web, then serve 127.0.0.1:7777 for product-site A/B checks.

items.label: Fresh evidence
items.detail: Re-run individual lanes when needed; keep gears-rust heavy recheck explicit.
